services.title: web platform
services.description: modern web built on next.js — marketing sites, content systems, commerce, saas, crypto and onchain apps.

services.title: ui engineering
services.description: figma-to-code execution — component systems, interaction, and production-ready ui.

services.title: embedded ic
services.description: principal-level frontend, embedded in your team — shipping alongside your engineers where design quality and engineering rigor need to coexist.

services.title: ai integration
services.description: practical ai features scoped to real use cases — not demos, not experiments.

services.title: advisory
services.description: short-term consulting on architecture, frontend systems, or product direction.

process: you tell me what you need. i'll figure out the rest.
i scope it and send it over.
i build it. fast, communicative, on time.
you ship. clean code, docs, everything your team needs.
optionally, i stick around. retainer and maintenance available.
